description_long: This office building features a striking, angular design with a central core and three radiating wings, each with a unique curvature and facade treatment. The exterior is dominated by alternating bands of reflective glass and dark horizontal stripes, giving it a modern, high-rise appearance. The building's wings are slightly curved, creating a dynamic, flowing silhouette, while the central section appears to rise slightly above the rest, possibly housing a lobby or atrium. The facades display a regular pattern of windows, with some sections featuring continuous horizontal strip windows and others with more segmented, vertical arrangements. The overall structure is substantial, suggesting a multi-story office complex with a large internal volume. The building's surfaces are sleek and glossy, reflecting the surrounding environment and emphasizing its contemporary architectural style.
description: A modern, multi-winged office building with curved facades, reflective glass, and bold horizontal striping. Its dynamic, angular form and sleek surfaces give it a striking, contemporary appearance.
description_view_0: This view highlights the building's curved facade and prominent horizontal striping, with the central core and two radiating wings clearly visible.
description_view_1: From this angle, the central core is most prominent, and the three wings radiate outward, showing the building's unique Y-shaped footprint.
description_view_2: This side view emphasizes the curvature of the wings and the regular pattern of horizontal windows, with the striped facade dominating the visual impression.
description_view_3: The rear view reveals the depth of the central core and the angular intersections of the wings, with reflective surfaces and window patterns visible.
attribute_window_pattern: Regular horizontal strip windows with alternating bands, continuous along the facade with some vertical segmentation.
